title: Observer core — qa_mod A1 compliance + QCI determinism
_fixture_purpose: Canonical PASS: qa_mod A1 verified for range -100..200, QCI deterministic, T2 clean
source_grounding: qa_mod is standard modular residue-class arithmetic (Hardy and Wright, 2008), shifted to a no-zero alphabet per QA axiom A1 (Wildberger, 2005).

qci_tests.note: Corrected 2026-07-06: repeating [0,1,2] with cmap {0:8,1:16,2:24} produces a periodic raw match pattern [1,0,0,1,0,0,1,0,0,1] (4/10 triples match, not just one -- matches recur every 3rd triple since qa_mod(8+16,24)=24=cmap[2] realigns whenever the window starts back at label 0). known_match_rate=0.3333 is compute_qci's actual return value: a rolling-mean SERIES (window=3, min_periods=1), not a scalar -- its steady-state tail value converges to 1/3 (one match per 3-window) after two transient values (1.0, then 0.5).

t2_compliance.note: qa_mod uses int(x) cast on input only — output is pure integer arithmetic. No float state enters QA logic.

witnesses.observation: qa_mod used at line 34, compute_qci at line 37 — identical to qa_observer.core (independently confirmed 2026-07-06)
qa_mod at line 44, compute_qci at line 48 — same pattern (independently confirmed 2026-07-06)
qa_mod at line 65, compute_qci at line 69 — same pattern (independently confirmed 2026-07-06)
claimed same qa_mod/compute_qci pattern -- NOT independently verified, this directory is off-limits per project rules (frozen private finance scripts)

_witness_correction_2026_07_06: Two of the originally-claimed '6 domain witnesses' were false: eeg_chbmit_scale.py and qa_audio_residual_control.py (plus their imported modules eeg_orbit_observer_comparison.py, eeg_orbit_classifier.py) contain NO qa_mod or compute_qci anywhere -- grepped both files and their imports directly, zero matches. Both scripts are real, substantive QA work, but use a DIFFERENT method: EEG uses per-window topographic k-means classification (classify_segment_topographic, compute_orbit_sequence), audio uses matched-AC partial-correlation on OFR. Removed the false EEG/audio witnesses; the cert now honestly covers 3 confirmed + 1 unverifiable-by-policy (finance) domains, not 6.

validation_checks.description: qa_mod output in {1,...,m} for all inputs -100..200
